content_body:
We had a wonderful time in you beautiful cabin even though it rained everyday! We relaxed, grilled steaks, shopped and rode around and saw the beautiful scenery. This was our first trip to Blue Ridge and we hope to come back. My mom and I loved the little shops downtown and we had tons of fun on our train ride to Copperhill for the Christmas Village. Our little guy FINALLY decided to tell Santa what he wanted for Christmas! Thanks for sharing!
AL
title: Christmas Train Ride In The North Georgia Mountains
